product: Converting a partitioned table to liquid clustering is generally available
tagline: You can now convert an existing partitioned Delta Lake table to liquid clustering with ALTER TABLE ...
what_it_does: You can now convert an existing partitioned Delta Lake table to liquid clustering with ALTER TABLE ... REPLACE PARTITIONED BY WITH CLUSTER BY. Conversion minimizes reader and writer downtime and supports both external and managed tables.
why_it_matters: Conversion minimizes reader and writer downtime and supports both external and managed tables.
key_takeaway: You can now convert an existing partitioned Delta Lake table to liquid clustering with ALTER TABLE ...
